name: homestay-management-main
description: A full-stack Homestay Management System with a React frontend and Express.js backend.

scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others --kill-others-on-fail --names "BACKEND,FRONTEND" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta" "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix backend && npm run build --prefix frontend
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
